name: Putrakameshti Yagna
description: The sacred fire ritual performed by King Dasharatha to beget sons, leading to the birth of Rama and his brothers.

name: Sita Swayamvara
description: The contest in Mithila where Rama lifted and broke the celestial bow of Shiva (Pinaka), winning the hand of Sita.

name: The Exile
description: The fourteen-year journey into the Dandaka forest, triggered by Kaikeyi's boons, which served as the crucible for Rama's divine mission.

name: Hanuman's Leap
description: The miraculous flight across the ocean to Lanka, symbolizing the triumph of spirit over physical limitations.

name: Ramayana War
description: The cosmic battle between the forces of Rama and Ravana, ending in the victory of Dharma and the liberation of Sita.
